# Vendored Libraries

Third-party libraries included directly in the repository (no package manager).

| File | Library | Version | Source |
|------|---------|---------|--------|
| Stats.js | mrdoob/stats.js | — | https://github.com/mrdoob/stats.js |
| TrackballControls.js | Three.js addon | r78 | https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js |

Three.js itself is loaded from CDN (r78): `https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r78/three.js`
